props.title: Reg Monitor — 2026-04-29
props.description: CFTC vs states preemption war: 4 active fronts in 7 days, plus first-ever event-contract insider trading prosecution. Direct line to Polymarket/Kalshi US access and CalibrationGap operating surface.

props.text: ACT

props.title: CFTC v Wisconsin — federal preemption suit

props.text: Federal litigation

CFTC sued Wisconsin in federal court Apr 28 seeking injunctive + declaratory relief blocking AG Kaul's Apr 23 state suits against Kalshi, Polymarket, Crypto.com, Robinhood, Coinbase. Asserts exclusive federal jurisdiction over event contracts.

PM angle: if Wisconsin prevails, every state can revive gambling enforcement against PM platforms — direct hit on US-adjacent access. Watch the AZ TRO (already granted) for the federal-court template.

props.title: CFTC + DOJ v New York — SDNY filing

props.text: Federal litigation

CFTC and DOJ co-filed Apr 24 in S.D.N.Y. seeking declaratory judgment + permanent injunction blocking NY from applying state gambling laws to CFTC-registered exchanges. Fifth such CFTC suit (after AZ, CT, IL, WI).
PM angle: NY ruling sets precedent for the largest US state population and is the bellwether of the multi-state arc.

props.title: CFTC amicus in MA SJC — Commonwealth v KalshiEx

props.text: State court intervention
CFTC filed amicus Apr 24 in MA SJC No. SJC-13906 asserting exclusive federal authority over PM. Distinct posture: state-court intervention rather than federal-court suit.
PM angle: state-court win for CFTC accelerates jurisdictional resolution outside federal-court timeline.

props.title: CFTC charges Army service member with event-contract insider trading

props.text: Enforcement action

Gannon Ken Van Dyke (Polymarket handle "Burdensome-Mix") allegedly used classified Operation Absolute Resolve intel on Maduro to buy 436k YES shares on "Maduro Out by Jan 31, 2026?" — ~$404k profit. First-ever event-contract insider trading complaint, first "Eddie Murphy Rule" application to PM. Criminal indictment unsealed same day in SDNY.
PM angle: establishes regulatory floor that strengthens Polymarket institutional legitimacy.

Operator action: have polymarket-comments cross-check Burdensome-Mix against tracked-handle dossier; UMA-resolution arb thesis (Iran-cf vs Hez-cf) gains weight if precedent expands to misresolved contracts.
WATCH

props.title: Senate Moreno resolution to ban senators from PM trading

props.text: Legislative
Moreno (R-OH) introduced Apr 24, called for unanimous consent. Narrower than Merkley S. 4017 (senators only). Bipartisan tone, no committee referral yet.

props.title: NYSE LLC — trade securities in tokenized form, immediate effectiveness

props.text: Regulatory
SRO filing effective on submission Apr 22. Tokenized securities trading at NYSE; structurally adjacent to PM/contract tokenization paths.
